heading: Community services and employment opportunities of Redwoods United, Inc. to be maintained at present rate of employment
label: 79p Community services and employment opportunities of Redwoods United, Inc. to be maintained at present rate of employment
text: The Secretary is further authorized, and the Congress specifically directs that it shall be a purpose of this Act, that the community services and employment opportunities provided by Redwoods United, Incorporated, a nonprofit corporation located in Manila, California, shall be maintained at the present rate of employment to the greatest degree practicable.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , , , which, insofar as classified to the Code, enacted sections 79c–1 and 79k to 79q of this title, amended former section 1a–1 and sections 79b and 79c of this title, and enacted provisions set out and formerly set out as notes under .
